prompt: Convert the hand-drawn wireframe sketch of UI components into a realistic screenshots of UI component demo website.
prompt_refined: Generate a realistic, high-fidelity screenshot of a modern web application or UI component library demo page. Use the hand-drawn wireframe elements from image 1 as a direct visual reference, translating each sketched component (such as buttons, input fields, checkboxes, sliders, toggles, star ratings, and a window element with a graph) into its polished, fully rendered, and functional-looking counterpart. Arrange these components within a clean, organized web interface, resembling a professional demo site. Ensure the final image conveys an interactive user experience, showcasing the diverse UI elements as they would appear in a live, functional web environment.
